integration.name: WP Fusion
integration.description: Sync SureForms submissions with your connected CRM through WP Fusion.

actions.name: Sync Contact
actions.description: Create or update a contact in your CRM via WP Fusion.

fields.label: Email Address
fields.placeholder: Select the form field with the contact's email
fields.description: Used as the unique identifier when WP Fusion syncs the contact.

fields.label: Auto Login
fields.description: Start an auto-login session after form submission, allowing the visitor to access protected content without a user account.

actions.name: Apply Tags
actions.description: Apply WP Fusion tags to the contact associated with this submission.

fields.label: Email Address
fields.placeholder: Select the form field with the contact's email
fields.description: Used as the unique identifier when WP Fusion syncs the contact.

fields.label: Tags
fields.description: Choose existing WP Fusion tags to be applied to the contact.

actions.name: Assign Lists
actions.description: Add the contact to CRM lists that are available in WP Fusion.

fields.label: Email Address
fields.placeholder: Select the form field with the contact's email
fields.description: Used as the unique identifier when WP Fusion syncs the contact.

fields.label: Lists
fields.description: Lists to assign the contact to when the workflow runs.
